title: Riding the Fire Horse (Without getting burned)
section_path: Riding the Fire Horse (Without getting burned)
section_path_text: Riding the Fire Horse (Without getting burned)
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2026-01-30_riding-the-fire-horse-without-getting-burned_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_d5b736df8512.png
Each Lunar New Year is characterized by one of 12 animals which appear in the Chinese zodiac. On Tuesday, February 17, 2026, a new chapter begins with the arrival of the Year of the Fire Horse-a rare and powerful pairing of one of the twelve zodiac animals with the Fire element in the sixty-year cycle. In Chinese tradition, the Horse symbolizes strength, movement, ambition, and success.
